            font-family: var(--font-body);

            background: var(--bg-white);

            background: var(--primary-color);
            padding: 1rem 0;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        }

            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 2rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

            color: #fff;
            text-decoration: none;

            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }
        .nav-back {
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.4rem;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .nav-back:hover { color: #fff; }

        /* Hero */
        .hero {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-dark) 0%, var(--primary-color) 100%);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 3.5rem 0 2.5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .hero .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 2rem;
        }
        .hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }
        .hero-subtitle {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            opacity: 0.9;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .hero-tagline {
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            opacity: 0.75;
        }

        /* Main content */
        .container {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 2rem;
        }
        .section {
            padding: 3rem 0;
        }
        .section + .section {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .section-title {
            font-family: var(--font-heading);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
        }
        .section-desc {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        /* Cards grid */
        .cards-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
            gap: 1.25rem;
        }
        .card {
            background: var(--bg-white);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
            transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
        }
        .card:hover {
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }
        .card-icon {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--primary-color);
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
        }
        .card h3 {
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
            color: var(--dark-blue);
        }
        .card p {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        .card-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        .btn-link {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.35rem;
            padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--primary-color);
            color: #fff;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-dark); }
        .btn-secondary {
            background: var(--bg-light);
            color: var(--text-dark);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-secondary:hover { background: #dde3e8; }

        /* Footer */
        footer {
            background: var(--dark-blue);
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
            text-align: center;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            margin-top: 2rem;
        }
        footer a {
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        footer a:hover { color: #fff; }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .hero-title { font-size: 1.6rem; }
            .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <nav class="navbar">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="nav-brand">
                <a href="../index.html">Warnes Innovations</a>
            </div>
            <a href="../index.html" class="nav-back">
                <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Back to main site
            </a>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <header class="hero">
        <div class="container">
            <h1 class="hero-title">SVU Application Materials</h1>
            <p class="hero-subtitle">Gregory R. Warnes, Ph.D.</p>
            <p class="hero-tagline">Candidate for Open Rank Professor of Computer Science &mdash; Southern Virginia University</p>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main>

        <!-- Resume -->
        <section class="section">
            <div class="container">
                <h2 class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i> Resume / CV</h2>
                <p class="section-desc">Academic curriculum vitae prepared for the SVU Open Rank Professor of Computer Science position.</p>
                <div class="cards-grid">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i></div>
                        <h3>Curriculum Vitae (PDF)</h3>
                        <p>Full academic CV in PDF format, optimized for the SVU Computer Science faculty position.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="resume.pdf" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i></div>
                        <h3>Curriculum Vitae (Web)</h3>
                        <p>Interactive web version of the CV for easy online viewing.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="resume.html" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> View Online</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Teaching Demo -->
        <section class="section">
            <div class="container">
                <h2 class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-chalkboard-teacher"></i> Teaching Demo</h2>
                <p class="section-desc">Lesson materials from the teaching demonstration: <em>Linked Lists &amp; Big-O Notation</em>.</p>
                <div class="cards-grid">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-desktop"></i></div>
                        <h3>Lecture Slides</h3>
                        <p>Full interactive slide deck presented during the teaching demo.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="slides.html" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-play"></i> View Slides</a>
                            <a href="slides.pdf" class="btn-link btn-secondary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-print"></i></div>
                        <h3>Student Handout</h3>
                        <p>Printable handout with key diagrams and summary content for students.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="handout.pdf" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-pencil-alt"></i></div>
                        <h3>Homework Assignment</h3>
                        <p>Problem set assigned with the lecture for student practice.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="homework.pdf" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-check-square"></i></div>
                        <h3>Answer Key</h3>
                        <p>Worked solutions to the homework assignment problems.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="answer-key.pdf" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-comment-dots"></i></div>
                        <h3>Speaker Notes</h3>
                        <p>Detailed presenter notes for each slide in the lecture deck.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="speaker-notes.pdf" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Career Visualization -->
        <section class="section">
            <div class="container">
                <h2 class="section-title"><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Career Trajectory</h2>
                <p class="section-desc">An interactive visualization of career interests and skill weights over time, highlighting the path toward academic teaching.</p>
                <div class="cards-grid">
                    <div class="card">
                        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-project-diagram"></i></div>
                        <h3>Career Weights Plot</h3>
                        <p>Interactive chart showing the evolution of professional focus areas and how teaching and academia have grown in importance.</p>
                        <div class="card-links">
                            <a href="career-weights.html" class="btn-link btn-primary" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> View Interactive Chart</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

    </main>

    <footer>
        <p>Gregory R. Warnes, Ph.D. &mdash; <a href="mailto:greg@warnes-innovations.com">greg@warnes-innovations.com</a> &mdash; <a href="../index.html">warnes-innovations.com</a></p>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

- Use a CSS/JS approach
